title: Roles and Keys Posture
description: Read-only view of VistA security keys and role assignments for a single user within a tenant. VistA keys (File 200 KEYS field) and security key definitions (File 19.1) are the source of truth. RPCs for reading key assignments exist but need verification. Write-back for programmatic key assignment is research-required. Platform does not own VistA key data; it mirrors read-only.

dataSources.description: VistA user key assignments — read-only mirror.
VistA security key definitions — read-only reference.
